---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae"
---

## Curriculum Vitae

Add a PDF version of your CV to `files/cv.pdf`, then uncomment or update the link below.

[Download CV](files/cv.pdf)

## Education

- **Degree**, Institution, Year  
  Advisor: Advisor Name

## Experience

- **Position**, Institution or Organization, Year-Year

## Awards

- Award name, year

## Service

- Reviewer, conference or journal name, year
